1.name: Butler
1.info: I was polishing silver until 11 PM.

2.name: Son
2.info: I was speaking to my father until 8 PM.

3.name: Mark Wain
3.info: I was in the library till 7 PM.

4.name: Wife
4.info: At 10pm I went to see my husband in his room where i was accompanied by the maid,where we met the dead body of my dear husband

5.name: Maid
5.info: I was preparing food till 10pm,then I went to Master's room to fetch him for dinner,which is when i saw the dead body.Madam also was with Me.
